phrases.intent_en: Ask if the tropical greenhouse is included in the entry ticket
phrases.text_local: La grande serre tropicale est-elle comprise dans le billet d'entrée ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah GRAND sehr tro-pee-KAL eh-TEL kom-PREEZ dan leh bee-YAY dan-TRAY
phrases.cultural_note: Parc Phoenix features one of Europe's largest tropical greenhouses — 7,000 square metres housing exotic plants and animals.

responses.english: Yes, it is included in the ticket.
responses.phonetic: wee say tahn-KLOO dahn luh bee-YAY
responses.french: Oui, c'est inclus dans le billet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the butterfly garden is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le jardin des papillons dans le parc ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV leh zhar-DAN day pah-pee-YON dan leh PARK
phrases.cultural_note: The butterfly house is a highlight for children — hundreds of tropical butterflies fly freely around visitors.

responses.english: In the large greenhouse, at the back.
responses.phonetic: dahn lah GRAHND SAIR oh FOHN
responses.french: Dans la grande serre, au fond.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are picnic areas in the park
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des espaces de pique-nique autorisés dans le parc ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day zes-PAS deh peek-NEEK oh-to-ree-ZAY dan leh PARK
phrases.cultural_note: Parc Phoenix has lovely lawns ideal for picnics. It's a popular spot for families and is easily reached by tram Line 2.

phrases.text_local: Le lac aux flamants roses est-il visible depuis l'entrée principale ?
phrases.pronunciation: leh LAK oh flah-MAN ROHZ eh-TEEL vee-ZEEBL deh-PWEE lan-TRAY pran-see-PAL
phrases.cultural_note: A flock of pink flamingos lives in the park's central lake — one of the first things you see on arrival.

responses.english: The flamingos are around the central lake.
responses.phonetic: lay flah-MAHN sohn toh-TOOR doo LAK sahn-TRAHL
responses.french: Les flamants sont autour du lac central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the park closes
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ferme le parc, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UHR FEHRM leh PARK seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Opening hours vary seasonally. The park typically closes earlier in winter — always check before visiting.
